title: Useless Ores mod
description: This is my first ever mod that I made while being bored. Feel free to edit anything you want
body:
## UOM features:
- Custom items and blocks
- Custom recipes
- Meme items
- Dumb ideas
- Bad textures

### Why to use this mod

This is no reason for you to need to use this mod unless you want to have fun with some meme items and with some funny recipes and mechanics

### **Feel free to download the source code from the official Github page for this mod!**

<details>
<summary>UOM Features (Many more are about to be added, please check To-do list)</summary>
  
  **Sapphire Block**
  
  **Raw Sapphire**
  
  **Raw Sapphire Block**
  
  **Bitcoin**
  
  **Cheesium**
  
  **Custom Recipes**
  
  **Cheesium Detector**

  **Sapphire**

  **Very powerful furnace fuel**

  **Meme sound effects**
  
</details>

**To-do list**
- Add custom ore generation
- Add 3d items
- Add more content
- Give the mod a purpose
- Improve textures
- Add SFX
- Make more fun
